name: regression_detection_v1
description: adapterOS adapter regression detection training data: global metric regression diagnosis, subset/catastrophic forgetting analysis, latency regression identification, detection methodology setup, and remediation workflows including rollback, root cause analysis, and retraining.

entries.notes: 1500 examples across five categories: global_regression (300), subset_regression (300), latency_regression (300), detection_methodology (300), remediation (300). All examples grounded in adapterOS quality ratchet, golden test suites, anomaly detection, hot-swap rollback, and bootstrap audit infrastructure.

provenance.review_notes: All metrics, thresholds, and workflows sourced from the adapterOS quality ratchet (NOISE_TOLERANCE=0.02), golden test suite infrastructure, contamination guard, diversity monitor, anomaly detector (z-score with configurable threshold), and hot-swap rollback system. Covers the full lifecycle from detection through diagnosis to remediation.

evaluation_gates: metric names match adapterOS quality report fields: compile_rate, test_pass_rate, exact_match_rate, avg_token_overlap
noise tolerance references use the canonical 0.02 threshold from RatchetConfig
golden test tolerance levels reference ExactMatch, CompileOnly, or TestPassOnly
rollback workflows reference the AdapterCommand::Rollback and two-phase hot-swap protocol
anomaly detection examples use z-score with configurable threshold as in AnomalyDetector
diversity metrics reference unique_bigram_ratio, unique_trigram_ratio, length_variance, repetition_rate, diversity_score
contamination guard references token overlap threshold and held-out set checking
audit records reference BootstrapAuditRecord with Ed25519 signatures
adapter version history references AdapterVersionRecord with parent_version lineage
latency examples reference LoRA rank, VRAM, and Metal/MLX kernel execution context
intent: Teach adapters to detect, diagnose, and remediate regressions across all quality dimensions: global metric drops, subset-specific catastrophic forgetting, latency degradation, safety violations, and routing failures. Covers the full regression lifecycle from automated detection through root cause analysis to verified recovery.

subcategories.global_regression: Diagnose cases where all quality metrics (compile_rate, test_pass_rate, exact_match_rate, avg_token_overlap) drop simultaneously. Root cause analysis spanning data quality, hyperparameters, pipeline bugs, and base model changes.
subcategories.subset_regression: Detect and analyze catastrophic forgetting where performance improves on some input categories while degrading on others. Includes diversity monitoring, contamination checking, and mitigation strategies.
subcategories.latency_regression: Identify performance degradation where accuracy is maintained but inference latency increases due to rank inflation, VRAM pressure, kernel inefficiency, or router overhead.
subcategories.detection_methodology: Design and configure regression detection infrastructure: golden test suites, quality ratchets, anomaly detectors, canary deployments, shadow mode evaluation, and statistical process control.
subcategories.remediation: Execute the full remediation workflow: detect regression, rollback to previous adapter version via hot-swap, investigate root cause, retrain with targeted fix, re-evaluate against baseline, and promote verified adapter.
